name: abs
doc: Absolute value.

name: acos
doc: Computes the inverse cosine of x.

name: acosh
doc: Computes the inverse hyperbolic cosine of x.

name: add
doc: Alias for x + y.

name: age
doc: Subtract arguments, resulting in the time difference between the two timestamps.

name: ago
doc: Subtracts an interval from the current timestamp, returning a timestamp in the past. Equivalent to current_timestamp - interval.

name: alias
doc: Return the name of the column.

name: any_value
doc: Returns the first non-NULL value from arg. This function is affected by ordering.

name: arg_max
doc: Finds the row with the maximum val and calculates the arg expression at that row. Rows where the value of the arg or val expression is NULL are ignored. This function is affected by ordering.

name: arg_max_null
doc: Finds the row with the maximum val and calculates the arg expression at that row. Rows where the val expression evaluates to NULL are ignored. This function is affected by ordering.

name: arg_min
doc: Finds the row with the minimum val and calculates the arg expression at that row. Rows where the value of the arg or val expression is NULL are ignored. This function is affected by ordering.

name: arg_min_null
doc: Finds the row with the minimum val and calculates the arg expression at that row. Rows where the val expression evaluates to NULL are ignored. This function is affected by ordering.

name: array_cosine_distance
doc: Computes the cosine distance between two arrays of the same size. The array elements cannot be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

name: array_cosine_similarity
doc: Computes the cosine similarity between two arrays of the same size. The array elements cannot be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

name: array_cross_product
doc: Computes the cross product of two arrays of size 3. The array elements cannot be NULL.

name: array_distance
doc: Computes the distance between two arrays of the same size. The array elements cannot be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

name: array_extract
doc: Extracts the indexth (1-based) value from the list.

name: array_inner_product
doc: Computes the inner product between two arrays of the same size. The array elements cannot be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

name: array_negative_inner_product
doc: Computes the negative inner product between two arrays of the same size. The array elements cannot be NULL. The arrays can have any size as long as the size is the same for both arguments.

name: array_pop_back
doc: Returns the list without the last element.

name: array_pop_front
doc: Returns the list without the first element.

name: array_push_front
doc: Prepends element to list.

name: array_to_string
doc: Concatenates list/array elements using an optional delimiter.

name: array_to_string_comma_default
doc: Concatenates list/array elements with a comma delimiter.

name: array_value
doc: Creates an ARRAY containing the argument values.

name: asin
doc: Computes the inverse sine of x.

name: asinh
doc: Computes the inverse hyperbolic sine of x.

name: atan
doc: Computes the inverse tangent of x.

name: atan2
doc: Computes the inverse tangent (y, x).

name: atanh
doc: Computes the inverse hyperbolic tangent of x.

name: avg
doc: Calculates the average of all non-null values in arg. This function is affected by ordering.

name: bit_and
doc: Returns the bitwise AND of all bits in a given expression.

name: bit_count
doc: Returns the number of bits that are set.

name: bit_or
doc: Returns the bitwise OR of all bits in a given expression.

name: bit_xor
doc: Returns the bitwise XOR of all bits in a given expression.

name: bitstring_agg
doc: Returns a bitstring whose length corresponds to the range of the non-null (integer) values, with bits set at the location of each (distinct) value.

name: bool_and
doc: Returns true if every input value is true, otherwise false.

name: bool_or
doc: Returns true if any input value is true, otherwise false.

name: can_cast_implicitly
doc: Whether or not we can implicitly cast from the types of the source value to the target value.

name: cardinality
doc: Return the size of the map (or the number of entries in the map).

name: cbrt
doc: Returns the cube root of the number.

name: ceil
doc: Rounds the number up.

name: ceiling
doc: Rounds the number up. Alias of ceil.

name: century
doc: Extracts the century of a timestamp.

name: checkpoint
doc: Synchronize WAL with file for (optional) database without interrupting transactions.

name: coalesce
doc: Return the first expression that evaluates to a non-NULL value. Accepts 1 or more parameters. Each expression can be a column, literal value, function result, or many others.

name: concat
doc: Concatenates multiple strings or lists. NULL inputs are skipped. See also operator ||.

name: constant_or_null
doc: If arg2 is NULL, return NULL. Otherwise, return arg1.

name: contains
doc: Returns true if the list contains the element.

name: corr
doc: The correlation coefficient.

name: cos
doc: Computes the cosine of x.

name: cot
doc: Computes the cotangent of x.

name: count
doc: Returns the number of rows.

name: count_if
doc: Aggregate function; rows contribute 1 if x is true or a non-zero number, else 0.

name: countif
doc: Returns the number of rows where arg is true.

name: covar_pop
doc: The population covariance, which does not include bias correction.

name: covar_samp
doc: The sample covariance, which includes Bessel's bias correction.

name: create_sort_key
doc: Constructs a binary-comparable sort key based on a set of input parameters and sort qualifiers.

name: current_catalog
doc: Return the name of the currently active catalog. Default is memory.

name: current_database
doc: Return the name of the currently active database.

name: current_localtimestamp
doc: Returns the current timestamp with time zone (at the start of the transaction).

name: current_query
doc: Return the current query as a string.

name: current_schema
doc: Return the name of the currently active schema. Default is main.

name: current_schemas
doc: Return list of schemas. Pass a parameter of true to include implicit schemas.

name: current_setting
doc: Return the current value of the configuration setting.

name: currval
doc: Return the current value of the sequence. Note that nextval must be called at least once prior to calling currval.

name: date_add
doc: Add the interval to the date and return a DATETIME value.

name: date_diff
doc: The number of part boundaries between startdate and enddate, inclusive of the larger date and exclusive of the smaller date.

name: date_part
doc: Get the subfield (equivalent to extract).

name: date_sub
doc: The signed length of the interval between startdate and enddate, truncated to whole multiples of part.

name: date_trunc
doc: Truncate to specified precision. Always returns a TIMESTAMP, even when the input is a DATE.

name: datepart
doc: Alias of date_part.

name: dayname
doc: The (English) name of the weekday.

name: days_in_month
doc: The number of days in the month of the given date.

name: decode
doc: Converts blob to VARCHAR. The optional on_error parameter controls handling of invalid UTF-8: 'strict' (default, throws error), 'replace' (replaces invalid characters with ?), or 'ignore' (removes invalid characters).

name: degrees
doc: Converts radians to degrees.

name: divide
doc: Alias for x // y.

name: element_at
doc: Return the value for a given key as a list, or an empty list if the key is not contained in the map. The type of the key provided in the second parameter must match the type of the map's keys; else, an error is thrown.

name: encode
doc: Converts the string to BLOB. Converts UTF-8 characters into literal encoding.

name: entropy
doc: The log-2 entropy of count input-values.

name: epoch
doc: Returns the total number of seconds since the epoch.

name: epoch_ms
doc: Returns the total number of milliseconds since the epoch.

name: epoch_ns
doc: Returns the total number of nanoseconds since the epoch.

name: epoch_us
doc: Returns the total number of microseconds since the epoch.

name: equi_width_bins
doc: Returns the upper boundaries of a partition of the interval [min, max] into bin_count equal-sized subintervals (for use with, e.g., histogram). If nice = true, then min, max and bincount may be adjusted to produce more aesthetically pleasing results.

name: error
doc: Throws the given error message.

name: even
doc: Round to next even number by rounding away from zero.

name: exp
doc: Computes e ** x.

name: extract
doc: Get subfield from a date.

name: factorial
doc: See the ! operator. Computes the product of the current integer and all integers below it.

name: favg
doc: Calculates the average using a more accurate floating point summation (Kahan Sum). This function is affected by ordering.

name: fdiv
doc: Performs integer division (x // y) but returns a DOUBLE value.

name: first
doc: Returns the first value (null or non-null) from arg. This function is affected by ordering.

name: flatten
doc: Flattens a nested list by one level.

name: floor
doc: Rounds the number down.

name: fmod
doc: Calculates the modulo value. Always returns a DOUBLE value.

name: force_checkpoint
doc: Synchronize WAL with file for (optional) database interrupting transactions.

name: from_base64
doc: Converts a base64 encoded string to a character string (BLOB).

name: fsum
doc: Calculates the sum using a more accurate floating point summation (Kahan Sum). This function is affected by ordering.

name: gamma
doc: Interpolation of the factorial of x - 1. Fractional inputs are allowed.

name: gcd
doc: Computes the greatest common divisor of x and y.

name: gen_random_uuid
doc: Return a random UUID (UUIDv4) similar to this: eeccb8c5-9943-b2bb-bb5e-222f4e14b687.

name: generate_series
doc: Generate a table of timestamps in the closed range, stepping by the interval.

name: geometric_mean
doc: Calculates the geometric mean of all non-null values in arg. This function is affected by ordering.

name: get_current_time
doc: Current time (start of current transaction) in the local time zone as TIMETZ.

name: getenv
doc: Returns the value of the environment variable var. Only available in the command line client.

name: glob
doc: Return filenames found at the location indicated by the search_path in a single column named file. The search_path may contain glob pattern matching syntax.

name: greatest
doc: Selects the largest value.

name: greatest_common_divisor
doc: Computes the greatest common divisor of x and y.

name: hash
doc: Returns a UBIGINT with the hash of the value. The used hash function may change across DuckDB versions.

name: hex
doc: Converts blob to VARCHAR using hexadecimal encoding.

name: histogram
doc: Returns a MAP of key-value pairs representing buckets and counts.

name: histogram_exact
doc: Returns a MAP of key-value pairs representing the requested elements and their counts. A catch-all element specific to the data-type is automatically added to count other elements when they appear, see is_histogram_other_bin.

name: histogram_values
doc: Returns the upper boundaries of the bins and their counts.

name: icu_sort_key
doc: Surrogate sort key used to sort special characters according to the specific locale. Collator parameter is optional. Only available when the ICU extension is installed.

name: if
doc: Ternary conditional operator; returns b if a, else returns c. Equivalent to CASE WHEN a THEN b ELSE c END.

name: ifnull
doc: A two-argument version of coalesce.

name: is_histogram_other_bin
doc: Returns true when arg is the "catch-all element" of its datatype for the purpose of the histogram_exact function, which is equal to the "right-most boundary" of its datatype for the purpose of the histogram function.

name: isfinite
doc: Returns true if the floating point value is finite, false otherwise.

name: isinf
doc: Returns true if the floating point value is infinite, false otherwise.

name: isnan
doc: Returns true if the floating point value is not a number, false otherwise.

name: julian
doc: Extract the Julian Day number from a date.

name: kurtosis
doc: The excess kurtosis (Fisher's definition) with bias correction according to the sample size.

name: kurtosis_pop
doc: The excess kurtosis (Fisher’s definition) without bias correction.

name: last
doc: Returns the last value of a column. This function is affected by ordering.

name: last_day
doc: The last day of the corresponding month in the date.

name: lcm
doc: Computes the least common multiple of x and y.

name: least
doc: Selects the smallest value.

name: least_common_multiple
doc: Computes the least common multiple of x and y.

name: length
doc: Returns the length of the list.

name: lgamma
doc: Computes the log of the gamma function.

name: list
doc: Returns a LIST containing all the values of a column. This function is affected by ordering.

name: list_aggregate
doc: Executes the aggregate function function_name on the elements of list. See the List Aggregates section for more details.

name: list_any_value
doc: Applies aggregate function any_value to the list.

name: list_append
doc: Appends element to list.

name: list_approx_count_distinct
doc: Applies aggregate function approx_count_distinct to the list.

name: list_avg
doc: Applies aggregate function avg to the list.

name: list_bit_and
doc: Applies aggregate function bit_and to the list.

name: list_bit_or
doc: Applies aggregate function bit_or to the list.

name: list_bit_xor
doc: Applies aggregate function bit_xor to the list.

name: list_bool_and
doc: Applies aggregate function bool_and to the list.

name: list_bool_or
doc: Applies aggregate function bool_or to the list.

name: list_concat
doc: Concatenates lists. NULL inputs are skipped. See also operator ||.

name: list_contains
doc: Returns true if the list contains the element.

name: list_cosine_distance
doc: Computes the cosine distance between two same-sized lists.

name: list_cosine_similarity
doc: Computes the cosine similarity between two same-sized lists.

name: list_count
doc: Applies aggregate function count to the list.

name: list_distance
doc: Calculates the Euclidean distance between two points with coordinates given in two inputs lists of equal length.

name: list_distinct
doc: Removes all duplicates and NULL values from a list. Does not preserve the original order.

name: list_entropy
doc: Applies aggregate function entropy to the list.

name: list_extract
doc: Extract the indexth (1-based) value from the list.

name: list_filter
doc: Constructs a list from those elements of the input list for which the lambda function returns true. DuckDB must be able to cast the lambda function's return type to BOOL. The return type of list_filter is the same as the input list's. See list_filter examples.

name: list_first
doc: Applies aggregate function first to the list.

name: list_grade_up
doc: Works like list_sort, but the results are the indexes that correspond to the position in the original list instead of the actual values.

name: list_has_all
doc: Returns true if all elements of list2 are in list1. NULLs are ignored.

name: list_has_any
doc: Returns true if the lists have any element in common. NULLs are ignored.

name: list_histogram
doc: Applies aggregate function histogram to the list.

name: list_inner_product
doc: Computes the inner product between two same-sized lists.

name: list_intersect
doc: Returns a list of all the elements that exist in both list1 and list2, without duplicates.

name: list_kurtosis
doc: Applies aggregate function kurtosis to the list.

name: list_kurtosis_pop
doc: Applies aggregate function kurtosis_pop to the list.

name: list_last
doc: Applies aggregate function last to the list.

name: list_mad
doc: Applies aggregate function mad to the list.

name: list_max
doc: Applies aggregate function max to the list.

name: list_median
doc: Applies aggregate function median to the list.

name: list_min
doc: Applies aggregate function min to the list.

name: list_mode
doc: Applies aggregate function mode to the list.

name: list_negative_inner_product
doc: Computes the negative inner product between two same-sized lists.

name: list_position
doc: Returns the index of the element if the list contains the element. If the element is not found, it returns NULL.

name: list_prepend
doc: Prepends element to list.

name: list_product
doc: Applies aggregate function product to the list.

name: list_reduce
doc: Reduces all elements of the input list into a single scalar value by executing the lambda function on a running result and the next list element. The lambda function has an optional initial_value argument. See list_reduce examples.

name: list_resize
doc: Resizes the list to contain size elements. Initializes new elements with value or NULL if value is not set.

name: list_reverse
doc: Reverses the list.

name: list_reverse_sort
doc: Sorts the elements of the list in reverse order. See the Sorting Lists section for more details about sorting order and NULL values.

name: list_select
doc: Returns a list based on the elements selected by the index_list.

name: list_sem
doc: Applies aggregate function sem to the list.

name: list_skewness
doc: Applies aggregate function skewness to the list.

name: list_slice
doc: Extracts a sublist or substring using slice conventions. Negative values are accepted.

name: list_sort
doc: Sorts the elements of the list. See the Sorting Lists section for more details about sorting order and NULL values.

name: list_stddev_pop
doc: Applies aggregate function stddev_pop to the list.

name: list_stddev_samp
doc: Applies aggregate function stddev_samp to the list.

name: list_string_agg
doc: Applies aggregate function string_agg to the list.

name: list_sum
doc: Applies aggregate function sum to the list.

name: list_transform
doc: Returns a list that is the result of applying the lambda function to each element of the input list. The return type is defined by the return type of the lambda function. See list_transform examples.

name: list_unique
doc: Counts the unique elements of a list.

name: list_value
doc: Creates a LIST containing the argument values.

name: list_var_pop
doc: Applies aggregate function var_pop to the list.

name: list_var_samp
doc: Applies aggregate function var_samp to the list.

name: list_where
doc: Returns a list with the BOOLEANs in mask_list applied as a mask to the value_list.

name: list_zip
doc: Zips n LISTs to a new LIST whose length will be that of the longest list. Its elements are structs of n elements from each list list_1, …, list_n, missing elements are replaced with NULL. If truncate is set, all lists are truncated to the smallest list length.

name: ln
doc: Computes the natural logarithm of x.

name: log
doc: Computes the base-10 log of x.

name: log10
doc: Alias of log. Computes the base-10 log of x.

name: log2
doc: Computes the base-2 log of x.

name: mad
doc: The median absolute deviation. Temporal types return a positive INTERVAL.

name: make_date
doc: The date for the given parts.

name: make_time
doc: The time for the given parts.

name: make_timestamp
signature: make_timestamp(bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, bigint, double)
doc: The timestamp for the given parts.

name: make_timestamp_ms
doc: Converts milliseconds since the epoch to a timestamp.

name: make_timestamp_ns
doc: Converts nanoseconds since the epoch to a timestamp.

name: map
doc: Returns an empty map.

name: map_concat
doc: Returns a map created from merging the input maps. On key collision the value is taken from the last map with that key.

name: map_contains
doc: Checks if a map contains a given key.

name: map_contains_entry
doc: Check if a map contains a given key-value pair.

name: map_contains_value
doc: Checks if a map contains a given value.

name: map_entries
doc: Return a list of struct(k, v) for each key-value pair in the map.

name: map_extract
doc: Return the value for a given key as a list, or NULL if the key is not contained in the map. The type of the key provided in the second parameter must match the type of the map's keys else an error is returned.

name: map_extract_value
doc: Returns the value for a given key or NULL if the key is not contained in the map. The type of the key provided in the second parameter must match the type of the map's keys; else, an error is thrown.

name: map_from_entries
doc: Returns a map created from the entries of the array.

name: map_keys
doc: Return a list of all keys in the map.

name: map_values
doc: Return a list of all values in the map.

name: max
doc: Returns the maximum value present in arg. This function is unaffected by distinctness.

name: md5
doc: Returns the MD5 hash of the blob as a VARCHAR.

name: md5_number
doc: Returns the MD5 hash of the blob as a HUGEINT.

name: md5_number_lower
doc: Returns the lower 8 bytes of the MD5 hash of string as a UBIGINT.

name: md5_number_upper
doc: Returns the upper 8 bytes of the MD5 hash of string as a UBIGINT.

name: median
doc: The middle value of the set. For even value counts, quantitative values are averaged and ordinal values return the lower value.

name: min
doc: Returns the minimum value present in arg. This function is unaffected by distinctness.

name: mode
doc: The most frequent value. This function is affected by ordering.

name: monthname
doc: The (English) name of the month.

name: multiply
doc: Alias for x * y.

name: nextafter
doc: Return the next floating point value after x in the direction of y.

name: nextval
doc: Return the following value of the sequence.

name: nullif
doc: Return NULL if a = b, else return a. Equivalent to CASE WHEN a = b THEN NULL ELSE a END.

name: octet_length
doc: Number of bytes in blob.

name: parse_formatted_bytes
doc: Parse a human-readable byte size string (e.g., '16 KiB') into a UBIGINT number of bytes. Throws an error on invalid input.

name: pg_typeof
doc: Returns the lower case name of the data type of the result of the expression. For PostgreSQL compatibility.

name: pi
doc: Returns the value of pi.

name: pow
doc: Computes x to the power of y.

name: power
doc: Alias of pow. Computes x to the power of y.

name: product
doc: Calculates the product of all non-null values in arg. This function is affected by ordering.

name: quantile_cont
doc: The interpolated pos-quantile of x for 0 <= pos <= 1. Returns the pos * (n_nonnull_values - 1)th (zero-indexed, in the specified order) value of x or an interpolation between the adjacent values if the index is not an integer. Intuitively, arranges the values of x as equispaced points on a line, sta

name: quantile_disc
doc: The discrete pos-quantile of x for 0 <= pos <= 1. Returns the greatest(ceil(pos * n_nonnull_values) - 1, 0)th (zero-indexed, in the specified order) value of x. Intuitively, assigns to each value of x an equisized sub-interval (left-open and right-closed except for the initial interval) of the inter

name: query
doc: Table function that parses and executes the query defined in query_string. Only constant strings are allowed. Warning: this function allows invoking arbitrary queries, potentially altering the database state.

name: query_table
doc: Table function that returns the table given in tbl_name.

name: radians
doc: Converts degrees to radians.

name: random
doc: Returns a random number x in the range 0.0 <= x < 1.0.

name: range
doc: Generate a table of timestamps in the half open range, stepping by the interval.

name: read_blob
doc: Returns the content from source (a filename, a list of filenames, or a glob pattern) as a BLOB. See the read_blob guide for more details.

name: read_text
doc: Returns the content from source (a filename, a list of filenames, or a glob pattern) as a VARCHAR. The file content is first validated to be valid UTF-8. If read_text attempts to read a file with invalid UTF-8 an error is thrown suggesting to use read_blob instead. See the read_text guide for more d

name: regr_avgx
doc: The average of the independent variable for non-NULL pairs, where x is the independent variable and y is the dependent variable.

name: regr_avgy
doc: The average of the dependent variable for non-NULL pairs, where x is the independent variable and y is the dependent variable.

name: regr_count
doc: The number of non-NULL pairs.

name: regr_intercept
doc: The intercept of the univariate linear regression line, where x is the independent variable and y is the dependent variable.

name: regr_r2
doc: The squared Pearson correlation coefficient between y and x. Also: The coefficient of determination in a linear regression, where x is the independent variable and y is the dependent variable.

name: regr_slope
doc: Returns the slope of the linear regression line, where x is the independent variable and y is the dependent variable.

name: regr_sxx
doc: The sample variance, which includes Bessel's bias correction, of the independent variable for non-NULL pairs, where x is the independent variable and y is the dependent variable.

name: regr_sxy
doc: The sample covariance, which includes Bessel's bias correction.

name: regr_syy
doc: The sample variance, which includes Bessel's bias correction, of the dependent variable for non-NULL pairs, where x is the independent variable and y is the dependent variable.

name: repeat
doc: Repeats the blob count number of times.

name: repeat_row
doc: Returns a table with num_rows rows, each containing the fields defined in varargs.

name: replace_type
doc: Recursively casts every field of value that has type source_type to target_type. The source and target types are supplied as NULL-typed values, e.g., NULL::VARCHAR. Useful for converting the field types of a deeply nested value (e.g., a STRUCT or LIST) in one call.

name: round
doc: Round to s decimal places. Values s < 0 are allowed.

name: round_even
doc: Alias of roundbankers(v, s). Round to s decimal places using the rounding half to even rule. Values s < 0 are allowed.

name: roundbankers
doc: Alias of round_even(v, s). Round to s decimal places using the rounding half to even rule. Values s < 0 are allowed.

name: row
doc: Create an unnamed STRUCT (tuple) containing the argument values.

name: sem
doc: The standard error of the mean.

name: setseed
doc: Sets the seed to be used for the random function.

name: sha1
doc: Returns a VARCHAR with the SHA-1 hash of the blob.

name: sha256
doc: Returns a VARCHAR with the SHA-256 hash of the blob.

name: sign
doc: Returns the sign of x as -1, 0 or 1.

name: signbit
doc: Returns whether the signbit is set or not.

name: sin
doc: Computes the sin of x.

name: skewness
doc: The skewness.

name: sleep_ms
doc: Pause execution for the specified number of milliseconds. Returns NULL.

name: sqrt
doc: Returns the square root of the number.

name: stats
doc: Returns a string with statistics about the expression. Expression can be a column, constant, or SQL expression.

name: stddev_pop
doc: The population standard deviation.

name: stddev_samp
doc: The sample standard deviation.

name: strftime
doc: Converts a date to a string according to the format string.

name: string_agg
doc: Concatenates the column string values with a comma separator (,). This function is affected by ordering.

name: strptime
doc: Converts the string text to timestamp applying the format strings in the list until one succeeds. Throws an error on failure. To return NULL on failure, use try_strptime.

name: struct_concat
doc: Merge the multiple structs into a single STRUCT.

name: struct_contains
doc: Check if the STRUCT contains the specified entry.

name: struct_extract
doc: Extract the named entry from the STRUCT.

name: struct_extract_at
doc: Extract the entry from a STRUCT (tuple) using an index (1-based).

name: struct_insert
doc: Add field(s) to an existing STRUCT.

name: struct_pack
doc: Create a STRUCT containing the argument values. The entry name will be the bound variable name.

name: struct_position
doc: Return the index of the entry within the STRUCT (1-based), or NULL if not found.

name: struct_update
doc: Add or update field(s) of an existing STRUCT.

name: struct_values
doc: Return the values of a STRUCT as an unnamed STRUCT (tuple).

name: subtract
doc: Alias for x - y.

name: sum
doc: Calculates the sum of all non-null values in arg / counts true values when arg is boolean. The floating-point versions of this function are affected by ordering.

name: tan
doc: Computes the tangent of x.

name: time_bucket
doc: Truncate date to a grid of width bucket_width. The grid is anchored at 2000-01-01[ + offset] when bucket_width is a number of months or coarser units, else 2000-01-03[ + offset]. Note that 2000-01-03 is a Monday.

name: to_base64
doc: Converts a blob to a base64 encoded string.

name: to_centuries
doc: Construct a century interval.

name: to_days
doc: Construct a day interval.

name: to_decades
doc: Construct a decade interval.

name: to_hours
doc: Construct an hour interval.

name: to_microseconds
doc: Construct a microsecond interval.

name: to_millennia
doc: Construct a millennium interval.

name: to_milliseconds
doc: Construct a millisecond interval.

name: to_minutes
doc: Construct a minute interval.

name: to_months
doc: Construct a month interval.

name: to_quarters
doc: Construct an interval of integer quarters.

name: to_seconds
doc: Construct a second interval.

name: to_weeks
doc: Construct a week interval.

name: to_years
doc: Construct a year interval.

name: today
doc: Current date (start of current transaction) in the local time zone.

name: trunc
doc: Truncates the number.

name: try_strptime
doc: Converts the string text to timestamp applying the format strings in the list until one succeeds. Returns NULL on failure.

name: txid_current
doc: Returns the current transaction's identifier, a BIGINT value. It will assign a new one if the current transaction does not have one already.

name: typeof
doc: Returns the name of the data type of the result of the expression.

name: unbin
doc: Converts a value from binary representation to a blob.

name: unhex
doc: Converts a value from hexadecimal representation to a blob.

name: union_extract
doc: Extract the value with the named tags from the union. NULL if the tag is not currently selected.

name: union_tag
doc: Retrieve the currently selected tag of the union as an Enum.

name: union_value
doc: Create a single member UNION containing the argument value. The tag of the value will be the bound variable name.

name: unnest
doc: Unnests a list by one level. Note that this is a special function that alters the cardinality of the result. See the unnest page for more details.

name: unpivot_list
doc: Identical to list_value, but generated as part of unpivot for better error messages.

name: uuid
doc: Return a random UUID (UUIDv4) similar to this: eeccb8c5-9943-b2bb-bb5e-222f4e14b687.

name: uuid_extract_timestamp
doc: Extracts TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE from a UUIDv7 value.

name: uuid_extract_version
doc: Extracts UUID version (4 or 7).

name: uuidv4
doc: Return a random UUID (UUIDv4) similar to this: eeccb8c5-9943-b2bb-bb5e-222f4e14b687.

name: uuidv7
doc: Return a random UUIDv7 similar to this: 81964ebe-00b1-7e1d-b0f9-43c29b6fb8f5.

name: var_pop
doc: The population variance, which does not include bias correction.

name: var_samp
doc: The sample variance, which includes Bessel's bias correction.

name: version
doc: Return the currently active version of DuckDB in this format.

name: weighted_avg
doc: Calculates the weighted average of all non-null values in arg, where each value is scaled by its corresponding weight. If weight is NULL, the value will be skipped. This function is affected by ordering.

name: xor
doc: Bitwise XOR.
